posts.author: jwarner (Joshua Warner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, Folks!

I love the Workload calendar visual system for visualizing individual team member’s workloads week by week, and I am working on building out my team’s work load, trying to use estimated effort over the course of unique timelines to gauge the load, but running into some issues.

What I’m trying to do is use a Timeline Column to denote the length of a given project (in weeks), and a Numbers Column to denote the current Workload as a percentage of their
daily effort (something like percent of their day or week spent working on the project). The issue is that the Workload feature keeps essentially splitting out the Workload as a division of that Workload over the period of time, rather than listing it as that percentage per week for the given timeline.

Am I missing some key functionality to accommodate something like that?
